item.title: Welcome
item.description: Table of Contents   toc Environment Variables Overview Permissions Overview Permission Values Checking Permissions User and Group creation Users Groups SSH SSH SSHD Environment Variables Overview Environment variable are a core concept when working with linux. Youll see them tossed around and used in a variety of locations. They can be distinguished by their unique $ character at the beginning of the variable's definition, and capitalized structure. Some of the most common you'll see used are:
